tagline: Crafted with Care, Baked to Perfection
design_philosophy: Dark cinematic luxury bakery. Emphasizes warm, inviting golden tones against a deep, premium obsidian background. High use of negative space, spotlight-style lighting effects, elegant typography, and rich textures. No generic flat UI; everything must feel crafted and artisanal.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8, p-16, p-24) to emphasize luxury and breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_pages: Use bento grids with wide gaps (gap-8, gap-12). Leverage asymmetry.
layout_and_spacing.admin_dashboard: Dense bento grid (Control Room mode) using p-4/p-6, gap-4/gap-6, avoiding excess negative space to prioritize data density.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-gold-muted for cards, combined with backdrop-blur for glassmorphism.

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-obsidian font-semibold px-8 py-3 hover:bg-forest hover:text-gold transition-all duration-300 shadow-gold-glow hover:shadow-gold-glow-strong rounded-none border border-gold
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold text-gold px-8 py-3 hover:bg-gold hover:text-obsidian transition-all duration-300 rounded-none

cards.style: bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.02)] border border-gold/10 backdrop-blur-md p-6 sm:p-8 hover:border-gold/30 transition-all duration-500 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-gold/30 text-ivory focus:border-gold focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 w-full placeholder:text-ivory/30 transition-colors

navigation.style: fixed w-full z-50 bg-obsidian/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gold/10 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons shift from Gold bg to Deep Forest Green bg with Gold text. Images have subtle slow-scale (1.05x).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) with duration 0.6s and ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Use lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Parallax effect on hero background image.

hero_background.description: Warm, intimate cinematic café interior with rustic decor and dim lighting.

signature_pastry_2.description: Freshly baked croissants with dark luxury tone.

signature_cake.description: Rich dark chocolate cake slice with tea.

artisan_bread.description: Dark sourdough bread on black textile.

gallery_interior.description: Moody warm cafe interior with vintage lights.

media.overlay_rules: All background images MUST have a gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-b from-obsidian/70 to-obsidian/90`) to ensure text contrast and maintain the #1A1A1A rich dark theme.

iconography: lucide-react with thin stroke widths (1.5). Colors must be gold or ivory.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #FFFFF0 against #1A1A1A (passes easily). Ensure gold #D4AF37 against #1A1A1A passes WCAG AA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, menu items, cart triggers) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the color palette globally. The background must be #1A1A1A in global CSS (index.css).
Use standard semantic HTML sectioning. Ensure generous padding using Tailwind.
For the dynamic menu, implement robust state management for categories and cart.
Admin dashboard must use a denser layout compared to the marketing side. Strip away excessive padding in admin views to prioritize data.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, modals, and tables in the admin dashboard, but customize them to remove default Vercel/light-theme aesthetics, applying the Obsidian/Gold theme.
Hero section must use the provided `hero_background` image URL, with text centered or elegantly left-aligned, employing the `Cormorant Garamond` serif font in gold.
